name: Thai-German Products Public Company Limited
summary: Thai-German Products Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes stainless steel pipes, sheets, axles, and equipment in Thailand. The company offers industrial stainless steel pipes; heat exchanger tubes; stainless steel pipes for sugar and ice industries; decorative stainless steel pipes; sanitary tubes for food, beverage, and pharmaceutical industries; Hartsfield stainless 3D products; and stainless steel sheets for applications in indoor and outdoor decoration, kitchenware, furniture, refrigerator, etc. It also provides Extuba turbo tubes; ornamental tubes that are used as handles of subway and sky train stations, interior/exterior doors of buildings, overpass fences, kitchen equipment, furniture, and pushcarts; and Missspectro services. In addition, the company offers services, such as coil slitting, coil polishing, and cutting of coil to sheets for various industries, including automotive, cold storage, kitchenware, etc.; stainless steel grade testing services; and stainless steel forming services, such as round, flat, and angle bars. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Rayong, Thailand.
